title: School Bus Monitors
description: Maintain order among students on a school bus. Duties include helping students safely board and exit and communicating behavioral problems. May perform pretrip and posttrip inspections and prepare for and assist in emergency evacuations.

tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist children with disabilities or children with psychological, emotional, or behavioral issues with boarding and exiting the school bus.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Buckle seatbelts or fasten wheelchair tie-down straps to secure passengers for transportation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean school bus interiors by picking up waste, wiping down windows, or vacuuming.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct students boarding and exiting the school bus.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct students evacuating the bus during safety drills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Escort young children across roads or highways.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evacuate students from the school bus in emergency situations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide the driver when the bus is moving in reverse gear.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor for trains at railroad crossings and signal the bus driver when it is safe to proceed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor the conduct of students to maintain discipline and safety.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Open and close school bus doors for students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate a wheelchair lift to load or unload wheelchairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prevent or defuse altercations between students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report delays, accidents, or other traffic and transportation situations to dispatchers or other bus drivers, using phones or mobile two-way radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to students' questions, requests, or complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Talk to children's parents or guardians about problematic behaviors, emotional or developmental problems, or related issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write and submit reports that include data such as the number of passengers or trips, hours worked, mileage driven, or fuel consumed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
